# Xanadu API Reference

- [b87ed4794d879db1250121fa200ab06b1d93758f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b87ed4794d879db1250121fa200ab06b1d93758f.md) -- Get started using ServiceNow APIs with guides, resources, and reference documentation.
  - [f858a2f42448d263af1e699c002d08a5afa2fc47](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f858a2f42448d263af1e699c002d08a5afa2fc47.md) -- You can use JavaScript APIs to extend application server and client functionality. Use web services to connect ServiceNow applications to other software applications.
    - [981ef40f290dd2346cdbe9409f4fcf0b6c49d68d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/981ef40f290dd2346cdbe9409f4fcf0b6c49d68d.md) -- Use scripts to extend your instance beyond standard configurations. With scripts, you may automate processes, add functionality, integrate your instance with an outside application and more.
      - [87992ef2cf8ccb9674ddc1a12664513456b2dbfc](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/87992ef2cf8ccb9674ddc1a12664513456b2dbfc.md) -- Scripts can be used in many places. The most important detail is whether the script runs on the client or the server.
      - [0bd75b6d6a359fd0accd0bf5fdaa5a4f94a5be7e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0bd75b6d6a359fd0accd0bf5fdaa5a4f94a5be7e.md) -- The ServiceNow Glide classes expose JavaScript APIs that enable you to conveniently work with tables using scripts.
        - [118d442927e2169a9de47132f1b5271769034988](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/118d442927e2169a9de47132f1b5271769034988.md) -- Glide is an extensible Web 2.0 development platform written in Java that facilitates rapid development of forms-based workflow applications (work orders, trouble ticketing, and project management, for example).
      - [77089f41e103a6676ccdcfb5172c274560e065c1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/77089f41e103a6676ccdcfb5172c274560e065c1.md) -- Scripts, assignment rules, business rules, workflows, escalations, and engines all take effect in relation to a database operation, such as insert or update. In many cases, the order of these events is important.
      - [70026756eb81a0e24863f7e7bb6b66ec8c432808](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/70026756eb81a0e24863f7e7bb6b66ec8c432808.md) -- Script fields evaluate data based on the field type of the input.
      - [f693d742ec7a3d58abee49b86a3a721bdca8b973](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f693d742ec7a3d58abee49b86a3a721bdca8b973.md) -- You can send messages to customers as alerts, informational messages, or error messages.
      - [08604ac2d05957e48ff39f75fff1e50d850312a0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/08604ac2d05957e48ff39f75fff1e50d850312a0.md) -- Use ServiceNow Now Assist for code generation for help writing scripts quickly with AI-generated code based on text or code prompts.
        - [429495c7996dcf25a8c1e3aa23bc125d5d9ada93](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/429495c7996dcf25a8c1e3aa23bc125d5d9ada93.md) -- Learn about how AI-generated code can empower developers scripting on the ServiceNow AI Platform.
          - [1a26914439849d7dbb4422f1f8bbc5d4968f5c19](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1a26914439849d7dbb4422f1f8bbc5d4968f5c19.md) -- Use these general guidelines for code generation to get better code suggestions and create useful and accurate scripts.
        - [54c5f361069397738fb498c8d871dcbd6e03f12c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/54c5f361069397738fb498c8d871dcbd6e03f12c.md) -- Configure how developers can use code generation on an instance.
          - [189201165f9b2e142f1ea84761e29759752a2c66](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/189201165f9b2e142f1ea84761e29759752a2c66.md) -- Install the ServiceNow Now Assist for Creator application from the ServiceNow Store to get Now Assist for code generation.
          - [3ffa9475f072dfa6fcbd1c08561819430ec861a5](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3ffa9475f072dfa6fcbd1c08561819430ec861a5.md) -- Control when to track and indicate that code is AI-generated.
            - [3964cb1f25d38419a0373f890f5578d27c3ab2e3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3964cb1f25d38419a0373f890f5578d27c3ab2e3.md) -- Show that code was generated by AI in script editors for a specified duration after accepting code suggestions.
            - [5b01b23e3f61f1431a30f0fb2c4ee572a4561527](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5b01b23e3f61f1431a30f0fb2c4ee572a4561527.md) -- Turn off tracking and indicating which code is AI-generated.
        - [3e2695cd960d96ab2b060307b57b7e7dca20aeeb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3e2695cd960d96ab2b060307b57b7e7dca20aeeb.md) -- Generate scripts from text, code, or a combination of both with AI-powered code generation.
          - [204610b32bd1a59bdb15a21050aa05baf8258772](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/204610b32bd1a59bdb15a21050aa05baf8258772.md) -- Write scripts quickly with AI-generated code by telling Now Assist what you want the script to do.
          - [60030f82bc6420b4d1b57746be76a98208ca542a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/60030f82bc6420b4d1b57746be76a98208ca542a.md) -- Write scripts quickly with AI-generated code completion.
        - [c4557529f91c9797703bf284b3b37cc09e718963](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/c4557529f91c9797703bf284b3b37cc09e718963.md) -- Edit scripts quickly by telling Now Assist how to improve the code.
        - [755080416a77dc181e26e4ddb66c4148586ade1f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/755080416a77dc181e26e4ddb66c4148586ade1f.md) -- Reference topics provide additional information about configuration properties, roles, and more.
          - [53f3e7dac6a9e3ae83c98d57bae5b5ed519a9d7d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/53f3e7dac6a9e3ae83c98d57bae5b5ed519a9d7d.md) -- You can adjust how code generation functions on an instance using several advanced properties.
          - [b1640cd716e73affb7885fe48f1e0c7350042faa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b1640cd716e73affb7885fe48f1e0c7350042faa.md) -- The following roles are installed for use with code generation.
      - [e5e8046ef43fd6e03638f327bebbee48712701ad](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/e5e8046ef43fd6e03638f327bebbee48712701ad.md) -- The syntax editor provides support for editing JavaScript scripts.
        - [8825428692ab7ed7b26138ec51b81a6cada6156a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/8825428692ab7ed7b26138ec51b81a6cada6156a.md) -- Enable the syntax editor plugin to use the syntax editor.
          - [b2b5a07761a3e56b6d8e3f68510c8b41d32c40fe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b2b5a07761a3e56b6d8e3f68510c8b41d32c40fe.md) -- The syntax editor provides editing functions to support editing JavaScript scripts.
          - [c2ea498e26b0930cd3433ebd3c28a827b84998ba](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/c2ea498e26b0930cd3433ebd3c28a827b84998ba.md) -- The syntax editor offers keyboard shortcuts and actions to assist in writing code.
          - [877cc01094ee6068694ccfb91f05403fcf1f34d1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/877cc01094ee6068694ccfb91f05403fcf1f34d1.md) -- Script macros provide shortcuts for typing commonly used code. To insert macro text into a script field, enter the macro keyword followed by the Tab.
          - [b3b54e24d3caf48a0b51028efdce1f99439c11a8](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b3b54e24d3caf48a0b51028efdce1f99439c11a8.md) -- Administrators can define new script macros or modify existing script macros.
        - [13396377297590306c15d2240c4825b7a30fde74](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/13396377297590306c15d2240c4825b7a30fde74.md) -- View the context menu for script includes, Glide APIs, and tables in the JavaScript syntax editor.
        - [43ee9d4f875834d2edf0e0f86dcd606226785088](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/43ee9d4f875834d2edf0e0f86dcd606226785088.md) -- All script fields provide controls for checking the syntax for errors and for locating the error easily when one occurs. The script editor places the cursor at the site of a syntax error and lets you search for errors in scripts by line number.
        - [2a375627b6bf4af4f06f417cf34957de81def24c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2a375627b6bf4af4f06f417cf34957de81def24c.md) -- To locate the exact position of the error in a large script, click the Go to line icon.
          - [3518964ced90e8b149aab3a79867a96497e54028](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3518964ced90e8b149aab3a79867a96497e54028.md) -- When the syntax editor is disabled, users can navigate to a specific line in the code using the Go to line icon ( The go to line icon ).
      - [9ac8d4abee00c195e9def10b4fd5e530daeb77f5](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/9ac8d4abee00c195e9def10b4fd5e530daeb77f5.md) -- The HTML syntax editor provides support for editing HTML and Jelly scripts and defines what's rendered when the page is displayed. The HTML syntax editor can contain either static XHTML or dynamically generated content defined as Jelly, and can call script includes and UI Macros.
      - [0353788c7a4594f4bdd3008c729bed2161a7e37c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0353788c7a4594f4bdd3008c729bed2161a7e37c.md) -- The code editor provides support to use programming language services in a text editor and is used in scripts.
      - [93f4110796a32119bc8cafe77fca9afb8ac86928](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/93f4110796a32119bc8cafe77fca9afb8ac86928.md) -- Server scripts run on the server or database. They can change the appearance or behavior of ServiceNow or run as business rules when records and tables are accessed or modified.
        - [797b26dc6bddd9f2b4f7538fe7f4af816a302611](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/797b26dc6bddd9f2b4f7538fe7f4af816a302611.md) -- ServiceNow provides APIs for the Glide Server.
          - [f6ad1a6c7ad568e19960e61a00e921c2f4c4c8ad](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f6ad1a6c7ad568e19960e61a00e921c2f4c4c8ad.md) -- The GlideAggregate class is an extension of GlideRecord and allows database aggregation (COUNT, SUM, MIN, MAX, AVG) queries to be done. This can be helpful in creating customized reports or in calculations for calculated fields.
            - [2b96f7809a6a5485f57c490fc5067afe23116c77](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2b96f7809a6a5485f57c490fc5067afe23116c77.md) -- GlideAggregate is an extension of GlideRecord and its use is probably best shown through a series of examples.
          - [84ad4c693e3b269c4b14a1ad346b8efd75bc875c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/84ad4c693e3b269c4b14a1ad346b8efd75bc875c.md) -- GlideRecord is a special Java class (GlideRecord.java) that can be used in JavaScript exactly as if it was a native JavaScript class.
          - [5adcc8124ad2125b24a4b4198797258d311606aa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5adcc8124ad2125b24a4b4198797258d311606aa.md) -- GlideRecordSecure is a class inherited from GlideRecord that performs the same functions as GlideRecord, and also enforces ACLs.
          - [0feb377e50947dee7aedf753caa7702e69c0cc56](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0feb377e50947dee7aedf753caa7702e69c0cc56.md) -- The GlideSystem API provides methods for retrieving information.
          - [b2445350e7e78d2b2150fe2bbc6fe8006a6e8d5d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b2445350e7e78d2b2150fe2bbc6fe8006a6e8d5d.md) -- The GlideDateTime class provides methods for performing operations on GlideDateTime objects, such as instantiating GlideDateTime objects or working with glide_date_time fields.
            - [e9d9902a3f856e0b464d95b7b69ef1136cbf278a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/e9d9902a3f856e0b464d95b7b69ef1136cbf278a.md) -- The GlideDate and GlideDateTime APIs are used to manipulate date and time values.
            - [77827ab7d580b1130facbf810479eb9565508f05](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/77827ab7d580b1130facbf810479eb9565508f05.md) -- Examples of JavaScript that can be used to set the value of a duration field.
            - [2b7ab4935bf7f144ac35cb2cee5a1b3e14325186](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2b7ab4935bf7f144ac35cb2cee5a1b3e14325186.md) -- You can specify a date format with a sequence of specific date and time pattern strings. A pattern string consists of one or more uppercase and lowercase letters from A to Z. Any text within quotation marks is ignored and is instead copied into the date output.
        - [53fbaa38b98d93a23ec9549912e45d04454ef94a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/53fbaa38b98d93a23ec9549912e45d04454ef94a.md) -- A business rule is a server-side script that runs when a record is displayed, inserted, updated, or deleted, or when a table is queried.
          - [3fb30eff2f95be668818e85d5ec0eeff357262b7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3fb30eff2f95be668818e85d5ec0eeff357262b7.md) -- To configure business rules, you first need to determine when the business rule should run and what action it should take.
          - [3cd166c50fd907a62413ecf9943840da45be0a88](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3cd166c50fd907a62413ecf9943840da45be0a88.md) -- Every business rule is assigned to either a private application scope or to the global scope.
          - [4c26063d1e0527492a386d69dfcb92a013752532](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4c26063d1e0527492a386d69dfcb92a013752532.md) -- You can create any type of business rule to run when a record is displayed, inserted, updated, or deleted, or when a table is queried.
          - [33afd97422a85f8e80b74249b23855ae4bbcd7b4](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/33afd97422a85f8e80b74249b23855ae4bbcd7b4.md) -- Predefined global variables are available for use in business rules.
          - [71cd137af4eedbab6bd16a19db342fedc3395661](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/71cd137af4eedbab6bd16a19db342fedc3395661.md) -- Implement both business rules and client scripts for a field to enable users to set record values properly using both forms and lists, and to see immediate changes to the values in forms as edits are made.
            - [bafd7021fa2bc32a26d723bbb655233745d7c8a6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/bafd7021fa2bc32a26d723bbb655233745d7c8a6.md) -- The string NULL has a particular role in scripts and is a reserved word.
          - [8413012e606d28763a52dcc4aa92dc9977b23d9f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/8413012e606d28763a52dcc4aa92dc9977b23d9f.md) -- Display rules are processed when a user requests a record form.
          - [d79535c7e212fd98e35b79650acc2c1a4348d76d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d79535c7e212fd98e35b79650acc2c1a4348d76d.md) -- This business rule determines whether the active field value needs to change based on changes to the State field.
          - [85233053d013d05f4c692cc02ae7d3cd341bb151](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/85233053d013d05f4c692cc02ae7d3cd341bb151.md) -- Find an example business rule script that helps you with a requirement of your organization.
            - [0093b78c5e20e5f724284dc7003ef29e23186a29](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0093b78c5e20e5f724284dc7003ef29e23186a29.md) -- It is possible to compare two date fields or two date and time fields in a business rule, and abort a record insert or update if they are not correct.
            - [6876515a1a2c403fb8365862731b68232eaa03d1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6876515a1a2c403fb8365862731b68232eaa03d1.md) -- Fields in XML format can be parsed with the system's getXMLText function.
            - [b384fc24fe2e9938860783154bc1bd49ac5a8687](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b384fc24fe2e9938860783154bc1bd49ac5a8687.md) -- In a before business rule script, you can cancel or abort the current database action using the setAbortAction() method.
            - [69516b67d2ee9b185db34b4ff01975f53861ed13](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/69516b67d2ee9b185db34b4ff01975f53861ed13.md) -- You can write a script for a business rule that is triggered on more than one database action.
            - [1d54ccd1a77db4e30fd6aeb0364c587682803acb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1d54ccd1a77db4e30fd6aeb0364c587682803acb.md) -- An OR condition can be added to any query part within a business rule.
            - [d847c8cd33cc14ce38b8006540350de7ac866223](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d847c8cd33cc14ce38b8006540350de7ac866223.md) -- A field defined as a glide list is an array of values stored in a single field.
            - [c20f5633767cb9004edae2628b9db9fc565bc702](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/c20f5633767cb9004edae2628b9db9fc565bc702.md) -- Use indexOf("searchString") to return the location of the string passed into the method if the glide list field, such as a Watch list, has at least one value in it.
            - [a01e5199cfc9b7c91b533aebf99f73464637ea23](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a01e5199cfc9b7c91b533aebf99f73464637ea23.md) -- You can lock user accounts if the user is not active.
            - [99796d1450828fc15ff4bcb0877eb5411930b508](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/99796d1450828fc15ff4bcb0877eb5411930b508.md) -- You can use a query business rule that executes before a database query is made.
        - [53f5d202f8d45935b91f2ebf8de975cb30629230](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/53f5d202f8d45935b91f2ebf8de975cb30629230.md) -- Script includes are used to store JavaScript that runs on the server.
          - [6453ca6bdb1406137e02b6b7da66eadf738b56dc](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6453ca6bdb1406137e02b6b7da66eadf738b56dc.md) -- Script includes have a name, description, and, script. They also specify whether they are active or not, and whether they can be called from a client script. View existing or create a new script include using the Script Include form.
          - [2629c57e855ce2ad235b7bd267941d1a8cb2f97a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2629c57e855ce2ad235b7bd267941d1a8cb2f97a.md) -- Script includes are found under System Definition or System UI. You can call existing script includes from a script or create a new script include.
          - [36cea14ea6e7c7f38bee2d7d17b6e3132941fbc7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/36cea14ea6e7c7f38bee2d7d17b6e3132941fbc7.md) -- Glide AJAX enabled Script Includes make the script include available to client scripts, list/report filters, reference qualifiers, or if specified as part of the URL.
            - [e709f938426b1d64052e5a99c6bd99396e01b96e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/e709f938426b1d64052e5a99c6bd99396e01b96e.md) -- Privacy settings for Glide AJAX enabled script includes determine who can access a Glide AJAX enabled script include.
              - [261c89c9d6c39bbf77350754df4b15c5c1ea0975](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/261c89c9d6c39bbf77350754df4b15c5c1ea0975.md) -- Change the privacy setting for a single Glide AJAX enabled script include by adding the isPublic() function.
              - [7452e44cd380bcbd9a1dc30f8c4fbda6d535a3ab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/7452e44cd380bcbd9a1dc30f8c4fbda6d535a3ab.md) -- Protect your Glide AJAX enabled script includes against unauthorized use. For all records which are created a customer application, recommendations display that may help reduce security risk.
          - [bd49623712bb7e52a996a212b06696482c2c0f68](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/bd49623712bb7e52a996a212b06696482c2c0f68.md) -- Discovery script includes define JavaScript classes that you can use to accomplish Discovery tasks.
            - [6bcc04e663d32a84ba2da56ce46a199ca2244528](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6bcc04e663d32a84ba2da56ce46a199ca2244528.md) -- When writing Discovery sensors and sensor-related scripts, you may want to use DiscoveryException or AutomationException to indicate that an exception has come from Discovery.
        - [b2cde1c31a135dae7427b439beb8c6a2a1486b21](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b2cde1c31a135dae7427b439beb8c6a2a1486b21.md) -- Processors provide a customizable URL endpoint that can execute arbitrary server-side JavaScript code and produce output such as TEXT or JSON. Creating custom processors is deprecated.
          - [ecfb446f91c4b21da0928595945b2b6cc7c736b7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ecfb446f91c4b21da0928595945b2b6cc7c736b7.md) -- Processors have access to dedicated API classes, objects, and methods.
          - [db7bb1dc50368681f72d1540e9b19c846b7dcec9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/db7bb1dc50368681f72d1540e9b19c846b7dcec9.md) -- You can protect your processor against unauthorized use by using role restrictions, and protect it by requiring a CSRF token.
            - [45599ebb8dd9288303b54ab0eabba77850eccb2a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/45599ebb8dd9288303b54ab0eabba77850eccb2a.md) -- You can protect a processor by requiring a CSRF token.
          - [5f99e77745de9c540360ef2f1a21588df743a084](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5f99e77745de9c540360ef2f1a21588df743a084.md) -- Create a simple processor to execute a script from a URL query. This feature is deprecated.
          - [91797d76e2dd4f42d160e698f8bca6d56be325c9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/91797d76e2dd4f42d160e698f8bca6d56be325c9.md) -- Create a multi-table processor that reports the number of rows in any table on your instance. This feature is deprecated.
          - [b85f731f752643d018fbc8ae7f9163efc43e41b6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b85f731f752643d018fbc8ae7f9163efc43e41b6.md) -- Create a custom processor to execute a script from a URL query. This feature is deprecated.
        - [7aaddc0d859213c1564e4134440d1b1b2c5978c2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/7aaddc0d859213c1564e4134440d1b1b2c5978c2.md) -- Administrators can use the Scripts - Background module to run arbitrary JavaScript code from the server.
        - [2b888f0f39200287a203d889697c6d847b5a649c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2b888f0f39200287a203d889697c6d847b5a649c.md) -- Installation settings are global business rules with calculated names. Installation settings are calculated just before a record is displayed and facilitate dynamic determination of access and roles. Installation Settings permit the programmatic determination of a setting.
        - [911e6035f97a88b90df46978b886b768274ce0b3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/911e6035f97a88b90df46978b886b768274ce0b3.md) -- Using the DurationCalculator script include, you can calculate a due date, using either a simple duration or a relative duration base on schedules.
          - [18df615d889581667349b9dea10b74100798df19](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/18df615d889581667349b9dea10b74100798df19.md) -- A simple duration is the number of seconds between two date times.
          - [692c47460e965ccd06702e6bd6a548feebe38c7a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/692c47460e965ccd06702e6bd6a548feebe38c7a.md) -- Relative duration is very similar to simple duration except a piece of script is used to determine what parts of a day to remove from the difference calculation.
        - [88563089dddadd4944bccd09bbe1b9b8da510201](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/88563089dddadd4944bccd09bbe1b9b8da510201.md) -- Using methods in the GlideRecord API, you can return all records from a table, return records from a table that satisfy specific conditions, or return records that include a string from a single table or from multiple tables in a text index group.
          - [dc5ef158710c62d027f88aed7eb6fd45ee551496](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/dc5ef158710c62d027f88aed7eb6fd45ee551496.md) -- Describes the operators that can be used within an addQuery() request.
          - [411223c1c16781dfeb2e75f59163b32d1b6511cd](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/411223c1c16781dfeb2e75f59163b32d1b6511cd.md) -- These examples demonstrate how to perform various GlideRecord queries.
        - [d3e014d3d3469ef50eed2812de6e627704588d9f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d3e014d3d3469ef50eed2812de6e627704588d9f.md) -- Service catalog order guides allow customers to make a single service catalog request that can generate several ordered items. Administrators can configure order guides to run automatically, from a workflow or a script to generate a set of ordered items without manually submitting a service catalog request. Administrators can also review and reprocess the order guide failures.
          - [1797c8a8fa9a2e2c1dfc958fb3e1051a2d78667a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1797c8a8fa9a2e2c1dfc958fb3e1051a2d78667a.md) -- Running order guides with a server-side script is more complex than using workflows, but it allows more flexibility and can be used in non-workflow situations.
          - [1c7b3f826c71d61896dd4e3b7e802ceac8ec6bfd](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1c7b3f826c71d61896dd4e3b7e802ceac8ec6bfd.md) -- Running an order guide from a workflow is suitable if you include order guides as part of a broader workflow-based process.
          - [0ae76eef68cfc3ce04088a4945d08f8bceca5b03](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0ae76eef68cfc3ce04088a4945d08f8bceca5b03.md) -- 
        - [94c38230adc10ed8c51391e06206f3678c501536](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/94c38230adc10ed8c51391e06206f3678c501536.md) -- Each catalog item has an associated execution plan, used whenever an item of that type is ordered; if no plan is specified, the default plan is used. This default is effective for most organizations, but your execution plan may need to vary based on additional criteria.
          - [cab4e8126a8aef4447d932131a7636651d7e242c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/cab4e8126a8aef4447d932131a7636651d7e242c.md) -- Execution plan scripts have limitations that need to be considered during their implementation.
          - [290c6c3ce32655600f7455aed5fa1f0842a0dd15](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/290c6c3ce32655600f7455aed5fa1f0842a0dd15.md) -- Follow these guidelines when writing execution plan scripts.
          - [10231976d24c8ad9eb492ddd3f99e592f8deea00](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/10231976d24c8ad9eb492ddd3f99e592f8deea00.md) -- You can add a script to a catalog item so that the script runs each time a user requests that item.
          - [0991eaea0e5e12124d6bf93a767c055755570fb2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0991eaea0e5e12124d6bf93a767c055755570fb2.md) -- You can use an approval rule script to approve an execution plan.
        - [a675729d5d45c8d800ab476638d7014fcf5a3720](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a675729d5d45c8d800ab476638d7014fcf5a3720.md) -- JavaScript regular expressions automatically use an enhanced regex engine, which provides improved performance and supports all behaviors of standard regular expressions as defined by Mozilla JavaScript. The enhanced regex engine supports using Java syntax in regular expressions.
          - [27f2b5b08dc0bbbfe41403759e2e5492c24bd401](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/27f2b5b08dc0bbbfe41403759e2e5492c24bd401.md) -- The enhanced regex engine includes an additional flag to allow Java syntax to be used in JavaScript regular expressions.
          - [6d72c9c394929b1bffc126eb3bf08da026ce0753](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6d72c9c394929b1bffc126eb3bf08da026ce0753.md) -- When you upgrade to Eureka Patch 5 or later releases, you should convert scripts that use the SNC.Regex API to use regular JavaScript expressions.
        - [7daafb5f1e5ae9f1b7206445705b63f1a027ea88](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/7daafb5f1e5ae9f1b7206445705b63f1a027ea88.md) -- You can use scripting to reference any request item variable from a table in scoped and non-scoped environment.
        - [4f31f428b460e39df7ca6e106a630c657b78422e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4f31f428b460e39df7ca6e106a630c657b78422e.md) -- GlideRecord variables (including current) are initially null in the database. Setting these back to an empty string, a space, or the JavaScript null value will not result in a return to this initial state.
        - [063cdecbf5c760d6dae34ebd5c2f2c6056f28af7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/063cdecbf5c760d6dae34ebd5c2f2c6056f28af7.md) -- A schedule page is a record that contains a collection of scripts that allow for custom generation of a calendar or timeline display.
          - [50bf8d971293f58a29fa331e173d8c8e6f981c1d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/50bf8d971293f58a29fa331e173d8c8e6f981c1d.md) -- To access schedule pages, navigate to System Scheduler Schedules Schedule Pages .
          - [884d6667b998da939d70245d47167e1a8cedc0b7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/884d6667b998da939d70245d47167e1a8cedc0b7.md) -- A Timeline Schedule Page is a specific record that contains configuration information for displaying time based points and spans in a "timeline" like fashion.
          - [6f8baf2a115f34511da9a0fea57868233b83c4fb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6f8baf2a115f34511da9a0fea57868233b83c4fb.md) -- The following example demonstrates how to create a timeline schedule page with corresponding script include utilizing a majority of the API described above.
        - [ce5cfa3bebf48d02ec51607dbec8ba9883be6f58](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ce5cfa3bebf48d02ec51607dbec8ba9883be6f58.md) -- A JavaScript object wrapper for parsing and extracting XML data from an XML document (String).
          - [14c8c52bc3518911ea8afd7e301bf5f25828589a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/14c8c52bc3518911ea8afd7e301bf5f25828589a.md) -- The XML helper script include makes it easy to parse XML in scripts.
        - [6b60d404b04afb762604cf2cba25bdb419717b6c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6b60d404b04afb762604cf2cba25bdb419717b6c.md) -- The JavaScript engine that evaluates server-side scripts supports the ECMAScript 2021 (ES12) standard.
          - [436fb80cfd86ea364fcb0276b99784ae691857f9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/436fb80cfd86ea364fcb0276b99784ae691857f9.md) -- JavaScript mode is a design and runtime setting for custom applications and scripts. To support existing server-side scripts and new scripts developed to the ECMAScript 2021 standard, the JavaScript engine has three modes: ECMAScript 2021 (ES12), ES5 Standards, and Compatibility.
            - [6f1ac4a80d896d57945cdfee787f8e5e77dae36d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6f1ac4a80d896d57945cdfee787f8e5e77dae36d.md) -- Switching the JavaScript mode for an application or script might change the behavior of existing scripts. Review some examples of behavior changes before switching JavaScript modes or to troubleshoot any issues that you experience after switching.
            - [c61e18a290cb7f9da10498a5542f4f2d318f66a1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/c61e18a290cb7f9da10498a5542f4f2d318f66a1.md) -- Configure which ECMAScript features can be used in an application by selecting the JavaScript mode.
            - [7cb8bf087c811d4f99bf6ff6fa08dc36b04e0da6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/7cb8bf087c811d4f99bf6ff6fa08dc36b04e0da6.md) -- Use the latest JavaScript features supported with ECMAScript 2021 (ES12) mode in server-side scripts in applications that use ES5 Standards mode or Compatibility mode.
          - [85d477a9e6392ce69c1d399ced9919bf06282805](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/85d477a9e6392ce69c1d399ced9919bf06282805.md) -- Compare ECMAScript features between the ECMAScript 2021 (ES12) and ES5 Standards JavaScript modes in Xanadu. Both modes support a subset of ECMAScript features.
        - [9759e20670f8f2e4afbaac019de23e551f9f3b8c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/9759e20670f8f2e4afbaac019de23e551f9f3b8c.md) -- The syntax editor can display context-sensitive API information.
      - [1c932b3da8220482207ca04a1e601b56d7cf53cf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1c932b3da8220482207ca04a1e601b56d7cf53cf.md) -- Run JavaScript on the client (web browser) when client-based events occur, such as when a form loads, after form submission, or when a field changes value.
        - [4676faf4f3b2b911d076548e114c89f1ca81b769](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4676faf4f3b2b911d076548e114c89f1ca81b769.md) -- Well-designed client scripts can reduce the amount of time it takes users to complete a form.
          - [d028fba142b6c8b2ed532af8deac807bf54b2d2c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d028fba142b6c8b2ed532af8deac807bf54b2d2c.md) -- If you create UI policies or client scripts for fields on a form, you must use another method to ensure that data in those fields is similarly controlled in a list.
          - [54b62d5d187b7a206e7dab9c128ca17fda568751](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/54b62d5d187b7a206e7dab9c128ca17fda568751.md) -- Use client data as much as possible to eliminate the need for time-consuming server lookups.
          - [6d446bcc559b9a36865cbb0fb9d9fb3bf7f5b7c7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6d446bcc559b9a36865cbb0fb9d9fb3bf7f5b7c7.md) -- When using setValue() on a reference field, include the displayValue parameter to avoid additional server calls.
          - [bf303d2ab69947ded1da530b55bb2fb303c17271](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/bf303d2ab69947ded1da530b55bb2fb303c17271.md) -- When possible, consider using a UI policy instead of a client script.
          - [2c73d96b86435034fc77b366a6df24c9af3d4908](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2c73d96b86435034fc77b366a6df24c9af3d4908.md) -- An excellent use for a client script is to validate the input from the user.
          - [ac28c33e03011b2f32cbb7d026f111a42c11fa0a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ac28c33e03011b2f32cbb7d026f111a42c11fa0a.md) -- Control the order of execution for your client scripts using the Order field. To avoid having two or more client scripts run concurrently and then conflict, you can add an order for the scripts to run in.
          - [075b381df4a60538aa539ff0601af48fb50aa466](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/075b381df4a60538aa539ff0601af48fb50aa466.md) -- Avoid Document Object Model (DOM) manipulation if possible. It can cause a maintainability issue when browsers are updated.
          - [1e549a42f7c1811d2706eac71f7779ba9727b6b5](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1e549a42f7c1811d2706eac71f7779ba9727b6b5.md) -- A global client script is any client script where the selected Table is Global. Global client scripts have no table restrictions, therefore they will load on every page in the system introducing browser load delay in the process.
          - [5ec13eab9a8ea045486ae0a55d94734f2b0481af](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5ec13eab9a8ea045486ae0a55d94734f2b0481af.md) -- Enclose the code in a client script inside a function.
          - [94bee3747cf23fa290247d6f5792442c5513d683](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/94bee3747cf23fa290247d6f5792442c5513d683.md) -- To avoid running time-consuming scripts unnecessarily, make sure that client scripts perform only necessary tasks.
        - [9cd4b7c4fb1667ffec89cb7fc0424ad510d54ed1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/9cd4b7c4fb1667ffec89cb7fc0424ad510d54ed1.md) -- Client scripts allow the system to run JavaScript on the client (web browser) when client-based events occur, such as when a form loads, after form submission, or when a field changes value.
        - [ac4cf7b59bd7c945ff7cba23cd34ba1550a63052](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ac4cf7b59bd7c945ff7cba23cd34ba1550a63052.md) -- UI scripts provide a way to package client-side JavaScript into a reusable form, similar to how script includes store server-side JavaScript. Administrators can create UI scripts and run them from client scripts and other client-side script objects and from HTML code.
          - [a540e7c795ec57bc4e80faea791f25002dca0b8d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a540e7c795ec57bc4e80faea791f25002dca0b8d.md) -- You can create a UI script and designate it as global, which makes the script available on any form in the system. You cannot create a global UI script in a scoped application.
          - [8a043fc12ed9ab1e0bb34ce93fa74d0029e17bf3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/8a043fc12ed9ab1e0bb34ce93fa74d0029e17bf3.md) -- Create a UI script to define reusable client-side JavaScript code.
          - [5d6f21e82821a55438ffb33d2a6206abcfd6e244](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5d6f21e82821a55438ffb33d2a6206abcfd6e244.md) -- Follow these guidelines when running UI scripts.
        - [4f21c4bbd729b932a3dec92a2b8ebd3e8544ce52](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4f21c4bbd729b932a3dec92a2b8ebd3e8544ce52.md) -- Client-side scripts can add dynamic effects and validation to forms. Scripts can apply to service catalog items or variable sets, allowing administrators to use the same functionality that is available on other forms.
          - [eef9982ef3a57b9343c3e2cf130bf6025586c4e8](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/eef9982ef3a57b9343c3e2cf130bf6025586c4e8.md) -- When you create catalog client scripts, be aware of the following considerations.
          - [45b7a79c6f68589547021403e304a1d55acad077](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/45b7a79c6f68589547021403e304a1d55acad077.md) -- Catalog client scripts are very similar to standard client scripts, with a few important differences.
          - [ad8606e696967a319fea00bde10b9ecc1d638880](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ad8606e696967a319fea00bde10b9ecc1d638880.md) -- Follow this procedure to create a catalog client script.
          - [d47e15894a3fc980f913dd511babf8a6432bf641](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d47e15894a3fc980f913dd511babf8a6432bf641.md) -- Examples of client scripts to perform common actions.
        - [ab5a72446d6bb876fd7cf0af4726d7f1da881088](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ab5a72446d6bb876fd7cf0af4726d7f1da881088.md) -- Client scripting for mobile is identical to scripting for the web, with some exceptions. All new scripts must conform to certain guidelines. The following items are affected on the mobile platform: client scripts, UI policies, navigator modules, and UI actions.

The name and value are passed into the UI macro.

            - [b82336be44002abfc4b29aeaf0685f12d76f553d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b82336be44002abfc4b29aeaf0685f12d76f553d.md) -- Use ${AND} to insert a JavaScript and in Jelly.

This can be resolved by reversing your test such that it is not necessary or by using ${AMP}lt; in place of the less than sign.
            - [f5185803dbe8b40384f2dfda9d46d58bec61bd25](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f5185803dbe8b40384f2dfda9d46d58bec61bd25.md) -- Normally, white space is removed by Jelly. To keep it, you must specify that it not be trimmed.

            - [6b754bbe21905a8ded16130f6b393ba6f7f51140](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6b754bbe21905a8ded16130f6b393ba6f7f51140.md) -- ServiceNow has a feature that allows the evaluation of Jelly to be traced.

        - [cb124291aaf88afe20e62f6844ef478065ce5a08](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/cb124291aaf88afe20e62f6844ef478065ce5a08.md) -- The Script Debugger enables users with the script_debugger role to debug server-side JavaScript. Users with the log_debugger role can use the Session Log to view and download required logs.
          - [660e6f441a01eb58f79cd1f882cff82cbe0cfd5d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/660e6f441a01eb58f79cd1f882cff82cbe0cfd5d.md) -- The Script Tracer can help you filter your debugging search to quickly narrow down script problems. You can identify lines of scripts in the Glide record that have undergone change during execution. Finding those specific lines of scripts rather than doing a wide search helps save time and improves productivity.
          - [8865bc889ec46571bc16a459afba638460f35380](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/8865bc889ec46571bc16a459afba638460f35380.md) -- The Script Debugger interface displays information about breakpoints set, the call stack and line number of the currently executing script line, details about variables and transactions, and status of console.
          - [a1eae0a4b0e25b41fca990f19d8e2aa023536754](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a1eae0a4b0e25b41fca990f19d8e2aa023536754.md) -- After the Script Debugger pauses a script, use the step-through controls to move between script lines and move between scripts in the call stack. Use the Console controls to expand console, collapse console, clear console, and rerun expressions.
          - [8328f41c48a0306b7ab1bdba6b058d9c3d468253](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/8328f41c48a0306b7ab1bdba6b058d9c3d468253.md) -- Define, declare, and verify new variables and functions while you debug a script in runtime using Console. The script execution must be paused to use Console.
            - [36cd83f822138d057f3059d10aae0f161e392d3f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/36cd83f822138d057f3059d10aae0f161e392d3f.md) -- You need to be aware of a few limitations when you use Console to evaluate expressions while debugging a script in runtime.
          - [109b14452c16ea1f40ea270f36da3d5779e677ba](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/109b14452c16ea1f40ea270f36da3d5779e677ba.md) -- Developers can launch the Script Debugger from the application navigator, Studio, or from the syntax editor.
          - [f764012072f626d15791a1a51cb98c65122b2aa7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f764012072f626d15791a1a51cb98c65122b2aa7.md) -- Set breakpoints or conditional breakpoints to pause scripts at specific lines, and remove breakpoints when you are done debugging them.
          - [b8d66eb57b47845aca6cf0b3c16460d98c3b9462](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b8d66eb57b47845aca6cf0b3c16460d98c3b9462.md) -- Set breakpoints or conditional logpoints to log messages to the console at specific lines, and remove logpoints when you are done debugging them.
          - [417dca83a63c6e28562b5bd292b1b5afbaed9985](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/417dca83a63c6e28562b5bd292b1b5afbaed9985.md) -- The Script Debugger status determines what debugging actions are available and what information it can display.
          - [27d2e479951efdadb5f6e814ad7c49bfb667fc25](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/27d2e479951efdadb5f6e814ad7c49bfb667fc25.md) -- The Script Debugger displays transaction details for the current paused user session.
          - [198fe602e1419ba1e20ffdf494d849217d6e9195](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/198fe602e1419ba1e20ffdf494d849217d6e9195.md) -- The Script Debugger provides a standard set of transaction details for developers to debug and troubleshoot scripts.
          - [56a1c1ed28c3871d7fea62ae4c9c3bbe88b090b1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/56a1c1ed28c3871d7fea62ae4c9c3bbe88b090b1.md) -- The Script Debugger allows multiple developers to debug their own transactions without affecting each other.
          - [56d47a135dbae1e7cbd815df8a2a30faa89df92a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/56d47a135dbae1e7cbd815df8a2a30faa89df92a.md) -- You can use the Script Debugger while impersonating another user, but only if the impersonated user has the script_debugger role and has read access to the target script.
          - [e6f573e64a2ddce4694b51f58ba067fc038059ce](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/e6f573e64a2ddce4694b51f58ba067fc038059ce.md) -- The Scripts - Background module does not support setting breakpoints directly in the script field. You can however, set breakpoints in the script objects called or triggered by the Scripts - Background module.
          - [a151cff3a437bd4f4be55480adab56ea52036f6d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a151cff3a437bd4f4be55480adab56ea52036f6d.md) -- Domain separation is supported in Script Debugger.
        - [4cd8498afc0a3ce43b63e2854f47de75455c9024](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4cd8498afc0a3ce43b63e2854f47de75455c9024.md) -- Enable session debugging to display debugging messages in the user interface.
          - [06ded8ee1b446b4d8c1beb341c08898ef551ace1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/06ded8ee1b446b4d8c1beb341c08898ef551ace1.md) -- Display session debug logs to help diagnose script and application problems.
        - [471cb1d6c6804f807e98896ddac23e2884ca03ad](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/471cb1d6c6804f807e98896ddac23e2884ca03ad.md) -- Application developers can display debug messages about configuration records to help them troubleshoot issues. The Debug Scopes module provides information about the system switching between custom applications to run server-side scripts.
          - [6bf3c54d36f59849317d11ad9be2591e710321a8](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/6bf3c54d36f59849317d11ad9be2591e710321a8.md) -- Application developers can use the Debug Scopes module to display information about when the system switches between custom applications to run server-side scripts.
        - [3de4d6f87283347321e0dd20eefa4ff91646238b](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3de4d6f87283347321e0dd20eefa4ff91646238b.md) -- Debugging business rules can be achieved with resources available in the ServiceNow product.
        - [60e5f00c24ce3d58b4ef820a56c2d650bdca04c5](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/60e5f00c24ce3d58b4ef820a56c2d650bdca04c5.md) -- You must add a system property to enable classification debugging.
        - [521f3b1a427f0b6d041be9341efbdc968f2b9613](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/521f3b1a427f0b6d041be9341efbdc968f2b9613.md) -- The field watcher tool tracks and displays all actions that the system performs on a selected form field.
          - [2d52f75ace816b9da5d81f90c37da1010be068b0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2d52f75ace816b9da5d81f90c37da1010be068b0.md) -- Access field-level debugging information using the field watcher.

            - [3701a824c69c9cb390f90e04dcb06707180dbf3e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3701a824c69c9cb390f90e04dcb06707180dbf3e.md) -- Administrators may need to watch a hidden field.
          - [69a7a1d8bf8998be9791e4f526b8d5a65f2e1d4d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/69a7a1d8bf8998be9791e4f526b8d5a65f2e1d4d.md) -- When information for a watched field is changed and the record is updated, the field watcher tab displays relevant information at the bottom.
          - [739798ca6f09be96c6f2115885b23d69fce0cecb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/739798ca6f09be96c6f2115885b23d69fce0cecb.md) -- The following example shows what happens to the Priority field on the incident form when both the Impact and Urgency fields change.
        - [08e1ba5bb1402c92d6dfcd265dc05d1f1c8b53d6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/08e1ba5bb1402c92d6dfcd265dc05d1f1c8b53d6.md) -- To write to the debug log in your client-side JavaScript, or UI policies, make a call to the global function jslog().
          - [7a55aaa12cb424d2dc4163a682beb81cd53c502b](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/7a55aaa12cb424d2dc4163a682beb81cd53c502b.md) -- Enabling the glide.ui.ui_policy_debug property lets you monitor the processing of UI actions.
          - [d8d78f69118b961e622329bce48bce37281d7534](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d8d78f69118b961e622329bce48bce37281d7534.md) -- JavaScript that runs on the browser, such as client scripts, can include a call to jslog() to send information to the JavaScript Log. Users with the admin role can access this log.
        - [1f2dac3a93287de302e95ec2d615cc23efae61ef](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1f2dac3a93287de302e95ec2d615cc23efae61ef.md) -- The JavaScript debug window appears in a bottom pane of the user interface when an administrator turns on debugging.
          - [734db623d0329952f52b09bc6825de9f1ff0c2a7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/734db623d0329952f52b09bc6825de9f1ff0c2a7.md) -- The JavaScript debug window enables access to the JavaScript Log and the Field Watcher tools.
        - [c4092b9361a59ab8243bd6e4175fa330212e4df2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/c4092b9361a59ab8243bd6e4175fa330212e4df2.md) -- The JS Code Coverage Debug application allows administrators and application developers to log the server-side scripts triggered during a user session and then review which lines of code the system ran.
          - [44220a12ae8f5c154c399a06d7992a38a425b4e9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/44220a12ae8f5c154c399a06d7992a38a425b4e9.md) -- The JS Code Coverage application highlights script fields to indicate whether the system ran or skipped each line.
          - [844b171f033dc104c2d9675df73fca81abd2dd4b](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/844b171f033dc104c2d9675df73fca81abd2dd4b.md) -- You can activate the JS Code Coverage Debug plugin (com.glide.js.coverage) if you have the admin role.
          - [544d20b0366f4aae4d35f6e2a3903a567e407f50](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/544d20b0366f4aae4d35f6e2a3903a567e407f50.md) -- Use JS Code Coverage Debug to record a user session and then review which server-side scripts and lines of code the system ran.
      - [a4c357523f5ea4ded45dcd6186bed5ae60dcae6c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a4c357523f5ea4ded45dcd6186bed5ae60dcae6c.md) -- The Packages Call Removal Tool provides modules to identify fields that might contain scripts, find scripts that contain Packages calls to ServiceNow Java classes, and to examine proposed script changes that eliminate those Packages calls.
        - [5fe4bbbf51482c4af4a183d576e86b796ecc243d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5fe4bbbf51482c4af4a183d576e86b796ecc243d.md) -- You must activate the Packages Call Removal Tool plugin to access the tool.
        - [113eb15d9bf5b352f4a0eccd030ff824ecc39b5f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/113eb15d9bf5b352f4a0eccd030ff824ecc39b5f.md) -- After you run the Find Packages Fields script to define the list of fields to search for Packages calls, run the Find Packages Calls script to generate the list of fields with Packages calls to ServiceNow Java classes. The script also proposes changes.
        - [f6d5c28972fbf4eac901d06b95967526f0c1af9e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f6d5c28972fbf4eac901d06b95967526f0c1af9e.md) -- The names of the new Glide objects that replace Packages calls are derived from the Java package name used in the Packages call.

ServiceNow supports both inbound (provider) and outbound (consumer) web services.

        - [63905dde388c277c7a026f116de84bf06d6bf2d6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/63905dde388c277c7a026f116de84bf06d6bf2d6.md) -- Simple Object Access Protocol (SOAP) is an XML-based protocol for accessing web services over HTTP.

            - [a3c3595edc28e154a5982fb4df0e3f5e03a68be0](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/a3c3595edc28e154a5982fb4df0e3f5e03a68be0.md) -- Follow this example to customize and control the XML payload of a SOAP response.

                - [cbe6b63ef0dc8eda7e89751c414e4f13c770d90d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/cbe6b63ef0dc8eda7e89751c414e4f13c770d90d.md) -- This example demonstrates the processing script for the FakeStockValue web service.
              - [1c075bbc4a16880132369ec0a7c371bc6ff14f52](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1c075bbc4a16880132369ec0a7c371bc6ff14f52.md) -- Create a static WSDL with the required format to override the standard WSDL for your scripted web service.

                - [ac7c6e830cdf61c086671bd5307a85bb35df925c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ac7c6e830cdf61c086671bd5307a85bb35df925c.md) -- This example demonstrates the FakeStockValue script include that implements much of the static WSDL behavior.
              - [928af28ff889e939f568419eb59f02ede4b29a49](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/928af28ff889e939f568419eb59f02ede4b29a49.md) -- Load the static WSDL into a SOAP client to make requests to the SOAP web service.
          - [28a96f9f48c334801780947b0302b2766898613d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/28a96f9f48c334801780947b0302b2766898613d.md) -- A direct web service is available for any table in the system if the correct access control list is configured.
            - [5b683f981c08fe0d4bf22125f5b68f58c2ca6a0f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5b683f981c08fe0d4bf22125f5b68f58c2ca6a0f.md) -- On occasion, there is a need to limit the number of field values that a SOAP query returns.

The fields are often reference fields that contain a sys_id for a record on another table.
            - [ff3e1ff5b2bc678cf3bce099c5a08d7a8ebda839](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ff3e1ff5b2bc678cf3bce099c5a08d7a8ebda839.md) -- You can pass an empty value through a SOAP parameter to clear the respective value in the target instance.
            - [d6149f61ea9a285c27e84abc5ae5524825af98e9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/d6149f61ea9a285c27e84abc5ae5524825af98e9.md) -- To get the contents of a journal field, make a second soap request against the sys_journal_field table to pull the appropriate journal records back for the record in question.
            - [9997fa00d567905a6bddf1004fd22814282c4eed](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/9997fa00d567905a6bddf1004fd22814282c4eed.md) -- To retrieve or set choice fields, use the choice Value, not the Label.
            - [3c3d8d21e32be38bfcdf42d228524c16a6e2b7e6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/3c3d8d21e32be38bfcdf42d228524c16a6e2b7e6.md) -- In circumstances when a SOAP client makes many calls in a short amount of time, you may want to re-use a single HTTP session for all SOAP calls.
            - [24aa4df46296a97f326eac7b2e771e650b80acfc](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/24aa4df46296a97f326eac7b2e771e650b80acfc.md) -- The standard SOAP API is a set of small, globally defined functions that can be performed on a targeted resource.

                - [edbfa98088cd7ddfd96b44fb4667df7756962f67](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/edbfa98088cd7ddfd96b44fb4667df7756962f67.md) -- Query the targeted table by example values and return a comma delimited sys_id list.
                - [9664fcd228733a44104acc96b6fa204299f80fe7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/9664fcd228733a44104acc96b6fa204299f80fe7.md) -- Query the targeted table by example values and return all matching records and their fields.
                - [367ec2cd17fa57eed4788e780410408812bc38fe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/367ec2cd17fa57eed4788e780410408812bc38fe.md) -- Query a single record from the targeted table by sys_id and return the record and its fields.
                - [e819f85a971a96e32b92693891beb783a910fe5d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/e819f85a971a96e32b92693891beb783a910fe5d.md) -- Query a table using an aggregate function including SUM, COUNT, MIN, MAX, LAST, and AVG.
              - [9d80990ca8bd837cc6d38c43ab1fa24dc1ffe949](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/9d80990ca8bd837cc6d38c43ab1fa24dc1ffe949.md) -- Data Modification API method summaries and descriptions.
                - [2bf7b77ee877009b55174aed2067c21a2a5b3bb6](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/2bf7b77ee877009b55174aed2067c21a2a5b3bb6.md) -- Creates a new record for the table targeted in the URL.
                - [656a6018a26ddfdf471694d0cf7d65c0620b2afd](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/656a6018a26ddfdf471694d0cf7d65c0620b2afd.md) -- Creates multiple new records for the table targeted in the URL.

The hierarchical data in the Insert API is automatically mapped to related records of the targeted table.

          - [f78d61206aeba0a921dcc18b9758c73dd5e3e649](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/f78d61206aeba0a921dcc18b9758c73dd5e3e649.md) -- Send requests to a REST web service endpoint by creating a REST message record.
            - [14fd98c2ff359f0bafa204959fe33be881861fe9](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/14fd98c2ff359f0bafa204959fe33be881861fe9.md) -- Define an HTTP method such as GET or POST to send a request to a web service provider.
              - [db2ba50de29431e182ebf7b25d91695d3b508fcd](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/db2ba50de29431e182ebf7b25d91695d3b508fcd.md) -- Test an HTTP method for an outbound REST message to ensure that the request is valid and the response returns as expected.
            - [5a470ee4fe53a0d6edc527aaf8fe33fe9aa5fa41](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/5a470ee4fe53a0d6edc527aaf8fe33fe9aa5fa41.md) -- Define an HTTP header for a REST message or HTTP method to send that header with REST requests.
            - [0921ea91f632dfe965dca1f96bd0f6ea47579ace](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/0921ea91f632dfe965dca1f96bd0f6ea47579ace.md) -- You can configure a REST message HTTP method to be sent through a MID Server.
            - [b01b1cd2d0d8ed1a4fe42991343aa2ef8a8adaac](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b01b1cd2d0d8ed1a4fe42991343aa2ef8a8adaac.md) -- A REST function URI or function variable may use special characters, such as pipe (|) characters.
          - [faf29b3044bf0143fdd3c746722243374fee8d50](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/faf29b3044bf0143fdd3c746722243374fee8d50.md) -- Outbound REST messages support multiple types of authentication.

              - [ed087cf515269f4d4815ddf50ee2ae770223821e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ed087cf515269f4d4815ddf50ee2ae770223821e.md) -- Create a basic auth profile to specify basic authentication credentials for one or more REST messages.
            - [737b0936578555ca7791a3e38637fe067876890a](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/737b0936578555ca7791a3e38637fe067876890a.md) -- You can configure an outbound REST message to send OAuth credentials with the request.
              - [66e1651134184fad94dad7579a7cf6b58609010d](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/66e1651134184fad94dad7579a7cf6b58609010d.md) -- Each client application must register with the instance to participate in OAuth authorization.
                - [1062f783f1a17a6b4760af62949ebb8ac5286a49](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/1062f783f1a17a6b4760af62949ebb8ac5286a49.md) -- In the OAuth provider scenario, profiles and scopes specify the grant type, authorization type, and level of access.
                  - [b10fade905ef62731313b8a75d979015b0d4384f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/b10fade905ef62731313b8a75d979015b0d4384f.md) -- An OAuth profile includes the grant type that the third-party OAuth provider needs to obtain access to the restricted resource.
                  - [e358ad48401da7b026f7419ac3c612f065883944](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/e358ad48401da7b026f7419ac3c612f065883944.md) -- Specify the OAuth scopes that you get from the provider. Scopes can be any level of access specified by the provider, such as read, write, or any string, including a URL.
              - [404c41ee3a10d6c196da7df8a34475d66ff2d64e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/404c41ee3a10d6c196da7df8a34475d66ff2d64e.md) -- This tutorial explains how to use an OAuth 2.0 profile to authenticate an outbound REST message with Google to retrieve contact information.
                - [666b1cceab77c74c6162311898edd5b46c35b6fb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/666b1cceab77c74c6162311898edd5b46c35b6fb.md) -- Use the Google Developer Console to set up an OAuth 2.0 provider.

                - [4ef7f5d3cc633b7a4d303fd4b2bbf98da15f4e44](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4ef7f5d3cc633b7a4d303fd4b2bbf98da15f4e44.md) -- Create a REST message and associated HTTP method to contact the Google service using the OAuth 2.0 profile.

          - [150dc40336a94bb05bacb1c23fec71097490e05e](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/150dc40336a94bb05bacb1c23fec71097490e05e.md) -- You can use variables when creating outbound REST messages and assign values to those variables when performing a request.
            - [309cd01a26faf172b787fd9d8526bfe15008e51c](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/309cd01a26faf172b787fd9d8526bfe15008e51c.md) -- Populate the list of variable substitutions automatically based on variables defined in several REST message HTTP method fields.
          - [555ace435855adc03a88168bd44e9e893d6416db](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/555ace435855adc03a88168bd44e9e893d6416db.md) -- You can send outbound REST requests from any place in the ServiceNow AI Platform where scripting is allowed.
            - [bd2a976802893620836e440571877fddf4736fcb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/bd2a976802893620836e440571877fddf4736fcb.md) -- You can generate an example script to send a REST message based on content and parameters you provide in the method record.
            - [ff8726c2d7c6d04d7f849f99dfba52a83f97735b](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/ff8726c2d7c6d04d7f849f99dfba52a83f97735b.md) -- You can send an outbound REST message directly to the endpoint.
            - [773d02b100fd1fd3f2da39359442ecf5b484864f](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/773d02b100fd1fd3f2da39359442ecf5b484864f.md) -- You can send an outbound REST message through a MID Server.

        - [4f0b3d42128566150ecf47659a73aa836abb0860](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/4f0b3d42128566150ecf47659a73aa836abb0860.md) -- The SOAP Message module can be used to develop, prototype, and save outbound SOAP messages that can be reused in business rules and scripts.
          - [64d416f2440ecc9b48957f18629a433bed46cc57](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/64d416f2440ecc9b48957f18629a433bed46cc57.md) -- The following video tutorial demonstrates how to configure outbound SOAP web service messages to consume third-party web services from an instance.
          - [fa2a1e8d2b768bc8fcf3ed3de4166b3c52fe8457](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/fa2a1e8d2b768bc8fcf3ed3de4166b3c52fe8457.md) -- Information needed to send SOAP requests is stored in SOAP message records.
            - [08da00e534ecf89c4e45c23b300774aa2ceb6146](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServiceNow/ServiceNowDocs/xanadu/markdown/employee-service-management/08da00e534ecf89c4e45c23b300774aa2ceb6146.md) -- Create a SOAP message to define the remote endpoint, WSDL, and authentication settings.
